TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kari rudan quri rungay-Sejiq Tuda = Sawxal rungay o sejiq ka hiya, ungat bkaruh ka sawxal, dhiya du musa smqit sida qhuni ngalun dha bkaruh. Embbiyax tmabun seyda du mrung da. Musa smqit dungal mn3 ka wada mrung. Msaang balay mi saw ka wada mrung ka sida qhuni u spqi dha sulay mi maa ngungu rungay, hiya du wada da.
S.PHON: = kaɾi ɾudan quɾi ɾuŋaj-səɟiq tuda = sawxal ɾuŋaj o səɟiq ka ħija, uŋat bkaɾuħ ka sawxal, dħija du musa smqit sida qħuni ŋalun dħa bkaɾuħ. əmbbijax tmabun səda du mɾuŋ da. musa smqit duŋal mn* ka wada mɾuŋ. msaaŋ balaj mi saw ka wada mɾuŋ ka sida qħuni u spqi dħa sulaj mi maa ŋuŋu ɾuŋaj, ħija du wada da.
S.FORM: = Kari rudan quri rungay-Sejiq Tuda = Sawxal rungay o sejiq ka hiya, ungat bkaruh ka sawxal, dhiya du musa smqit sida qhuni ngalun dha bkaruh. Embbiyax tmabun seyda du mrung da. Musa smqit dungal mn3 ka wada mrung. Msaang balay mi saw ka wada mrung ka sida qhuni u spqi dha sulay mi maa ngungu rungay, hiya du wada da.
S.PHON: = kaɾi ɾudan quɾi ɾuŋaj-səɟiq tuda = sawxal ɾuŋaj o səɟiq ka ħija, uŋat bkaɾuħ ka sawxal, dħija du musa smqit sida qħuni ŋalun dħa bkaɾuħ. əmbbijax tmabun səda du mɾuŋ da. musa smqit duŋal mn* ka wada mɾuŋ. msaaŋ balaj mi saw ka wada mɾuŋ ka sida qħuni u spqi dħa sulaj mi maa ŋuŋu ɾuŋaj, ħija du wada da.
